overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a first-person walk through a rocky canyon at golden hour, transitioning to an open coastal trail with expansive ocean views and distant mountains. The sequence features high-quality rendering with warm sunset lighting and reflective wet ground surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage between rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the rocky canyon toward the warm sunset light ahead

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock formation forming the left boundary of the canyon
steep rock cliff face on the right side of the path
wet reflective dirt trail winding through the canyon
hazy mountain silhouettes visible against the sunset sky
clusters of purple flowers growing along the right rock wall base

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow canyon passage with steep rock walls towering on both sides. The wet dirt path winds forward toward the warm golden sunset light visible in the distance. Sparse grass patches and purple wildflowers dot the rocky terrain along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal trail with ocean views

events.description: left rock wall drops away revealing the ocean and coastline to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coastal path as the canyon opens to reveal expansive ocean views on the left

entered.detail: calm ocean water reflecting the golden sunset light
scattered evergreen trees on the hillside to the right
isolated rock formation standing in the water offshore

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens dramatically as the left rock wall falls away to reveal a vast ocean view. The path continues along the coastline with the sun setting behind distant mountains across the water. The right cliff face gradually recedes into the distance as scattered pine trees become visible on the hillside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, towering canyon that gradually opens into an expansive coastal vista. It begins by winding along a wet dirt path flanked by steep rock walls, where sparse grass and purple wildflowers line the trail toward a distant golden glow. As the camera advances, the canyon opens dramatically when the left wall falls away to reveal a vast ocean view under a setting sun. The scene then shifts to a wide coastline where the right cliff face gradually recedes, giving way to scattered pine trees on the hillside. Finally, the path extends toward the horizon with the sun dipping behind distant mountains across the water.
